name: aibaby
description: Initial monorepo scaffold for the AI Baby MVP

scripts.test:mobile: npm --workspace @aibaby/mobile run test:app-shell && npm --workspace @aibaby/mobile run test:baby-profile-flow && npm --workspace @aibaby/mobile run test:chat-input && npm --workspace @aibaby/mobile run test:summary-history
scripts.test:web: npm --workspace @aibaby/web run test:baby-profile-api && npm --workspace @aibaby/web run test:timeline-api && npm --workspace @aibaby/web run test:uploads-api && npm --workspace @aibaby/web run test:text-meal-api && npm --workspace @aibaby/web run test:meal-drafts-api
